title: task
description:
Increase buffer sizes in lichen_l2.c and lora_l2.h to accommodate OSCORE overhead (~20+ bytes for Object-Security option). Update LICHEN_L2_MTU and tx/rx buffer sizes. This is a prerequisite for OSCORE integration.

Files to update:
- lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/lora_l2.h (LICHEN_LORA_FRAME_OVERHEAD)
- lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/lichen_l2.c (tx_ipv6_buf, rx_ipv6_buf sizing)
- firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/ (parallel copy)

Reference: FIXME(OSCORE) comments at lichen_l2.c:279 and firmware/bridge-zephyr version

Parent: project-LICHEN-r6fu.2
